API docs by Redocly

go-oikumenea API (0.0.0-dev)

Download OpenAPI specification:

Generated from the Conjure contract (api/*.conjure.yml) by tools/ir2openapi — do not hand-edit. Every endpoint takes a bearer token; authorization is decided by the PDP.

AuditService

Query the log, filterable by actor/target/unit/action/outcome/time, token-paginated.

Query the log, filterable by actor/target/unit/action/outcome/time, token-paginated.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
actorPersonId
string
actorType
string (AuditActorType)
Enum: "PERSON" "SYSTEM"

The two actor kinds (D-Audit). An instance admin is a PERSON, never a separate kind.

targetType
string
targetId
string
unitId
string
action
string
outcome
string (AuditOutcome)
Enum: "SUCCESS" "DENIED" "ERROR"

Outcome of the recorded action; denied write attempts are recorded too (D-Audit).

since
string <date-time>
until
string <date-time>
pageSize
integer <int32>
pageToken
string

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/audit/v1/audit

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "entries": [
    • {
      • "action": "string",
      • "actorPersonId": "string",
      • "actorType": "PERSON",
      • "after": null,
      • "before": null,
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "id": "string",
      • "outcome": "SUCCESS",
      • "requestId": "string",
      • "subsystem": "string",
      • "targetId": "string",
      • "targetType": "string",
      • "unitId": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "nextPageToken": "string"
}

Read one entry by its Action RID. Returns Audit:AuditEntryNotFound when absent.

Read one entry by its Action RID. Returns Audit:AuditEntryNotFound when absent.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
entryId
required
string

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/audit/v1/audit/{entryId}

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "action": "string",
  • "actorPersonId": "string",
  • "actorType": "PERSON",
  • "after": null,
  • "before": null,
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "id": "string",
  • "outcome": "SUCCESS",
  • "requestId": "string",
  • "subsystem": "string",
  • "targetId": "string",
  • "targetType": "string",
  • "unitId": "string"
}

AuthorizationService

List active assignments by subjectPersonId OR targetUnitId (exactly one), token-paginated (assignment.read).

List active assignments by subjectPersonId OR targetUnitId (exactly one), token-paginated (assignment.read).

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
subjectPersonId
string
targetUnitId
string
pageSize
integer <int32>
pageToken
string

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/authorization/v1/assignments

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "assignments": [
    • {
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "expiresAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "grantedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "grantedBy": "string",
      • "graphId": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "revokedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "revokedBy": "string",
      • "roleId": "string",
      • "scope": "string",
      • "subjectPersonId": "string",
      • "targetUnitId": "string",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "nextPageToken": "string"
}

Grant (subject, role, unit, scope, graph) + optional expiry (assignment.grant on the target unit).

Grant (subject, role, unit, scope, graph) + optional expiry (assignment.grant on the target unit).

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
expiresAt
string <date-time>

Optional decision-time expiry (RFC 3339).

graph
string

The cascade graph CODE for a subtree grant; omit to default to the command graph. Ignored for unit scope.

roleId
required
string
scope
required
string

One of unit | subtree.

subjectPersonId
required
string
targetUnitId
required
string

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/authorization/v1/assignments

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "expiresAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "graph": "string",
  • "roleId": "string",
  • "scope": "string",
  • "subjectPersonId": "string",
  • "targetUnitId": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • default

application/json

  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",

}

Revoke an assignment (reversible flip; assignment.revoke).

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
assignmentId
required
string

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/authorization/v1/assignments/{assignmentId}

}

Decide (subject, action, unit). Requires assignment.read reaching the unit.

Decide (subject, action, unit). Requires assignment.read reaching the unit.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
action
required
string
explain
boolean

When true, the response carries an explanation (DS-16). Default false.

subjectPersonId
required
string
unitId
string

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/authorization/v1/authorize

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "action": "string",
  • "explain": true,
  • "subjectPersonId": "string",
  • "unitId": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "allow": true,
  • "explanation": {
    • "contributions": [
      • {
        • "assignmentId": "string",
        • "graphCode": "string",
        • "instanceAdmin": true,
        • "roleCode": "string",
        • "scope": "string",
        • "targetUnitId": "string"
        }
      ],
    • "denyReason": "string"
    }
}

Batch decisions for one subject, with optional decision-explain (DS-16).

Batch decisions for one subject, with optional decision-explain (DS-16).

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
explain
boolean
required
Array of objects (AuthorizeQuery)
subjectPersonId
required
string

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/authorization/v1/authorize/batch

application/json

  • "queries": [

      • "unitId": "string"

    ],
  • "subjectPersonId": "string"

required
personId

Create a custom role (instance-scope role.create). Returns Role:RoleConflict if the code is taken.

Create a custom role (instance-scope role.create). Returns Role:RoleConflict if the code is taken.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
code
required
string
description
string
name
required
string
permissions
required
Array of strings

Permission codes from the catalog; instance-scope and unknown codes are rejected.

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/authorization/v1/roles

}

required

Edit a custom role (instance-scope role.update). Base roles return Role:RoleImmutable.

Edit a custom role (instance-scope role.update). Base roles return Role:RoleImmutable.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
roleId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
description
string
name
string
permissions
Array of strings

When present, fully replaces the permission set. Omit to leave permissions unchanged.

DocumentService

List the paper-type catalog.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/document/v1/document-types

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "attrSchema": null,
    • "code": "string",
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "id": "string",
    • "name": {
      • "property1": "string",
      • "property2": "string"
      },
    • "sortOrder": 0,
    • "status": "string",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
]

Add a document type (instance-scope). Returns Document:DocumentTypeConflict if the code is taken.

Add a document type (instance-scope). Returns Document:DocumentTypeConflict if the code is taken.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
attrSchema
any

Optional per-type attribute schema (D-DocumentAttrSchema); validated on document write when set.

code
required
string
name
required
string

Default-locale label; translatable via the localization store.

sortOrder
integer <int32>

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/document/v1/document-types

Edit a document type (instance-scope). code is immutable by convention.

bearerAuth
path Parameters
typeId
required
string

required
attrSchema
any

Replace the per-type attribute schema (D-DocumentAttrSchema). Omitted leaves it unchanged.

Attach a national-identifier code to a person. The value is validated against the scheme

Attach a national-identifier code to a person. The value is validated against the scheme (Document:PersonalCodeInvalid on failure) and encrypted; a duplicate (scheme, value) returns Document:PersonalCodeDuplicate.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
personId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
schemeCode
required
string
value
required
string

The plaintext identifier (pii:sensitive). Validated against the scheme, then stored as ciphertext + blind index.

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/document/v1/persons/{personId}/personal-codes

IdentityFederationService

Create an account for a person, optionally linking its first identity. Gates on

Create an account for a person, optionally linking its first identity. Gates on person.update. Returns Account:AccountConflict if the person already has an active account, Identity:IdentityConflict if the initial (issuer, subject) is already linked.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
email
string

The IdP-asserted email, if known.

object

The first login point to link; omit to create a login-less account shell.

personId
required
string

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/identity/v1/accounts

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "email": "string",
  • "identity": {
    • "issuer": "string",
    • "subject": "string"
    },
  • "personId": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "email": "string",
  • "id": "string",
  • "identities": [
    • {
      • "accountId": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "id": "string",
      • "issuer": "string",
      • "subject": "string"
      }
    ],
  • "personId": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Link an additional external identity (login point) to an account. Gates on `person.update`.

Link an additional external identity (login point) to an account. Gates on person.update. Returns Identity:IdentityConflict when linking is disabled and the account already has an active identity, or when the (issuer, subject) is already linked elsewhere.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
accountId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
issuer
required
string
subject
required
string

Responses

  • "issuer": "string",
  • "subject": "string"

boolean

MembershipService

Add a person's belonging to a unit, optionally filling a position. Returns Membership:PositionAlreadyFilled / Membership:MembershipConflict on a uniqueness clash.

Add a person's belonging to a unit, optionally filling a position. Returns Membership:PositionAlreadyFilled / Membership:MembershipConflict on a uniqueness clash.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
effectiveFrom
string <date-time>

When the membership takes effect; defaults to now.

orderItemId
string

Optional provenance pointer to the authorizing order item (D-Orders).

personId
required
string
positionId
string

The position to fill; omit for plain belonging.

unitId
required
string

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/membership/v1/memberships

      • "status": "string",
      • "unitId": "string",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "nextPageToken": "string"
}

List a unit's positions, token-paginated. Filter by state=vacant|filled.

List a unit's positions, token-paginated. Filter by state=vacant|filled.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
unitId
required
string
query Parameters
state
string

Filter — vacant (active, unfilled) | filled (active, with a holder). Omit for all active.

pageSize
integer <int32>
pageToken
string

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/membership/v1/units/{unitId}/positions

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "nextPageToken": "string",
  • "positions": [
    • {
      • "code": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "holder": {
        • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "effectiveFrom": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "effectiveTo": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",

        • "property2": "string"
        },
      • "unitId": "string",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ]
}

Responses

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
[
  • {

    • "effect": "string",

      • "property2": "string"
      },
    • "sortOrder": 0,
    • "status": "string",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
]

Add an order type (instance-scope). Returns Order:OrderTypeConflict if the code is taken.

Add an order type (instance-scope). Returns Order:OrderTypeConflict if the code is taken.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
category
required
string

One of personnel-list | appointment | leave-travel | discipline-incentive | duty-roster.

code
required
string
effect
required
string

One of membership-start | membership-end | rank-change | record-only.

name
required
string

Default-locale label; translatable via the localization store.

sortOrder
integer <int32>

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/order/v1/order-types

  • Payload
Content type
application/json

  • "effect": "string",

  • "sortOrder": 0
}

    },
  • "sortOrder": 0,
  • "status": "string",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Edit an order type (instance-scope). `code`, `category`, and `effect` are immutable by convention.

Edit an order type (instance-scope). code, category, and effect are immutable by convention.

bearerAuth
path Parameters
typeId
required
string

required
name
string

integer <int32>
status

Issue a draft order: lock it and AUTO-APPLY its structural effects in the same transaction

Issue a draft order: lock it and AUTO-APPLY its structural effects in the same transaction (D-OrderApply). All-or-nothing — a violated target invariant rolls the whole issue back (the order stays draft) and surfaces as Order:OrderEffectFailed. Returns Order:OrderAlreadyIssued if not draft.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
orderId
required
string

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/order/v1/orders/{orderId}/issue

Response samples

  • 200
  • default
Content type
application/json
{
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "id": "string",
  • "issuedOn": "string",
  • "issuingUnitId": "string",
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "effectiveFrom": "string",
      • "effectiveTo": "string",
      • "id": "string",
      • "note": "string",
      • "orderId": "string",
      • "personId": "string",
      • "positionId": "string",
      • "rankId": "string",
      • "typeId": "string",
      • "unitId": "string",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "number": "string",
  • "revokedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "revokedByOrderId": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Revoke an issued order (legal-status flip; effects are not auto-reversed). Returns Order:OrderNotIssued if not issued.

Revoke an issued order (legal-status flip; effects are not auto-reversed). Returns Order:OrderNotIssued if not issued.

bearerAuth

Create a person (no account, no unit needed). Returns Person:PersonConflict if the code is taken.

Create a person (no account, no unit needed). Returns Person:PersonConflict if the code is taken.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
attributes
any
birthdate
string
code
string
countryOfBirth
string
credentials
string
displayName
required
string
generation
string
given
string
given2
string
preferred
string
rankId
string

Optional initial rank (validated against the rank scheme).

sex
string

ISO/IEC 5218 value; defaults to not_known when omitted.

surname
string
surname2
string
surnamePrefix
string
title
string

Add or replace a call sign. Returns Person:PersonConflict if the value is already held by the person.

Add or replace a call sign. Returns Person:PersonConflict if the value is already held by the person.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
personId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
callSign
required
string
id
string

The URN RID of an existing call-sign row to replace; omit to add a new row.

isPrimary
boolean

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/person/v1/persons/{personId}/call-signs

personId
required

basis

birth | descent | naturalization | other; defaults to other.

country
required
string
isPrimary
boolean
lostOn
string

Hard-erase PII after the grace window (idempotent): NULLs every PII column and removes

Hard-erase PII after the grace window (idempotent): NULLs every PII column and removes citizenship/residence/name-variant rows, keeping the id as a tombstone so audit history stays intact. Returns Person:PersonLifecycleConflict before purgeAfter.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
personId
required
string

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/person/v1/persons/{personId}/purge

Response samples

  • 200
  • default

Set or clear the person's one rank (a directory attribute; D-Rank). Returns Person:PersonInvalid for an unknown rank.

Set or clear the person's one rank (a directory attribute; D-Rank). Returns Person:PersonInvalid for an unknown rank.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
personId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
rankId
string

The URN RID of the rank to assign; omit to clear the person's rank.

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

bearerAuth

              • "sortOrder": 0,
              • "typeId": "string"

          • "sortOrder": 0
          }
        ]
      }

}

bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
code
required
string
name
required
string
sortOrder
integer <int32>

Seniority ordinal; defaults to (max active sibling order + 1), i.e. appended last.

Soft-delete a scheme node, blocked if in use (a category with active types, a type with

Soft-delete a scheme node, blocked if in use (a category with active types, a type with active ranks, or — post-M5 — a rank held by a person). level is one of category | type | rank.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
level
required
string

The scheme level to delete; one of category | type | rank.

nodeId
required
string

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/rank/v1/rank-scheme/{level}/{nodeId}

    • "property1": null,
    • "property2": null
    }
}

      • "inDrift": true,
      • "missingCount": 0,
      • "sample": null
      }
    ]
}

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
graphId
required
string

required
isAuthorityBearing
boolean
isDefault
boolean

Setting true makes this the sole default; the previous default is cleared in the same transaction.

name
string

bearerAuth

level

  • 200
  • default
Content type

Create a unit. Returns Tenant:UnitCodeConflict if the code is taken among active units.

Create a unit. Returns Tenant:UnitCodeConflict if the code is taken among active units.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
code
required
string
level
integer <int32>
metadata
any
name
required
string
unitKind
string
visibility
string
Enum: "PUBLIC" "SHADOW"

Defaults to PUBLIC.

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/tenant/v1/units

unitId

string

Update name/kind/level/metadata/visibility. `code` is immutable by convention.

Update name/kind/level/metadata/visibility. code is immutable by convention.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
unitId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
level
integer <int32>
metadata
any
name
string
unitKind
string
visibility
string (Visibility)
Enum: "PUBLIC" "SHADOW"

A unit's read-time visibility. SHADOW units are filtered by the shadow gate (M7).

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/tenant/v1/units/{unitId}

Attach the path unit as a child of parentId within a graph (default command). Returns Tenant:UnitCycleDetected on a cycle.

Attach the path unit as a child of parentId within a graph (default command). Returns Tenant:UnitCycleDetected on a cycle.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
unitId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
graph
string

The graph code; defaults to command.

parentId
required
string

Transition the unit's lifecycle state. Returns Tenant:TransitionInvalid for an illegal transition.

Transition the unit's lifecycle state. Returns Tenant:TransitionInvalid for an illegal transition.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
unitId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
reason
string
toState
required
string (UnitState)
Enum: "ACTIVE" "SUSPENDED" "ARCHIVED"

A unit's lifecycle state. Transitions are reversible and recorded as append-only events.

Responses

local dev server (self-signed TLS)

https://localhost:8443/tenant/v1/units/{unitId}/transition

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "reason": "string",
  • "toState": "ACTIVE"
}
